data.title: Spyre Therapeutics issued 20,300 stock options to non-executive employees on Dec 1, 2025, as equity inducement awards.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Spyre Therapeutics, Inc. based in Waltham, Mass., made an announcement regarding granting stock options. The clinical-stage biotechnology company approved the grant of stock options to acquire a total of 20,300 shares of common stock to two non-executive employees. These options were awarded as equity inducement awards under the Spyre Therapeutics, Inc. 2018 Equity Inducement Plan. The approval of the stock options took place on December 1, 2025, and they were considered significant for the employees' decision to join Spyre. This action was in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4), with the aim to redefine the standard of care for inflammatory bowel disease and rheumatic diseases through the development of long-acting antibodies and antibody combinations.

data.title: Pheton Holdings Ltd acquires 51% of iTonic Corporation. Acquisition enhances healthcare technology portfolio.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Pheton Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ: PTHL), a healthcare solution provider focused on treatment planning systems for brachytherapy, completed the acquisition of 51% of the total outstanding shares of iTonic Corporation. iTonic is a U.S.-based integrated home health AI company that offers medical device automation and easier access to clinical expertise to support at-home care. This move is in line with Pheton's goal of expanding its presence in healthcare technology, allowing the company to reach a wider audience and improve patient outcomes through innovative solutions.

data.title: Taysha Gene Therapies granted two new employees options to purchase 212,000 shares of the company's stock on Dec 3, 2025.
data.description: On December 3, 2025, Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. disclosed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors awarded two new employees a total of 212,000 stock options as part of their employment agreement. These options allow the employees to buy shares of the Company's common stock. The grants were issued under the Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. 2023 Inducement Plan to attract key talent, in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Taysha is a clinical-stage biotech firm specializing in AAV-based gene therapies for severe monogenic CNS diseases. Taysha is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol TSHA.

data.title: Spanish Mountain Gold changes auditor to BDO LLP for Fiscal 2025, transitioning to an emerging developer. TSX-V: SPA, FSE: S3Y, OTCQB: SPAUF.
data.description: Spanish Mountain Gold Ltd., a mining company based in Vancouver, has recently switched its auditors from Smythe LLP to BDO LLP. This change is a strategic move in line with the company's growth plans as it aims to transition from a junior explorer to an emerging developer. Spanish Mountain Gold is listed on the TSX-V under SPA, on the FSE as S3Y, and on the OTCQB as SPAUF. The new auditor, BDO LLP, will serve until the conclusion of the company's upcoming annual general meeting of shareholders. This development signifies a significant step in the company's evolution and future prospects.

data.title: AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund (NYSE: AWF) declared $0.0488 per share special distribution on Dec. 5, 2025.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, AllianceBernstein Global High Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AWF), a closed-end management investment company, announced a special one-time income distribution of $0.0488 per share of Common Stock. The total distribution amount for this special dividend is $X.XX.

data.title: Stitch Fix (NASDAQ: SFIX) to join KeyBanc Capital Markets event on Dec 11-12, 2025 for Fireside Chat at 12:10 p.m. PT.
data.description: In San Francisco, Stitch Fix, Inc. (NASDAQ:SFIX), a prominent online personal styling service, shared plans to take part in the KeyBanc Capital Markets December Consumer Spotlight event on December 11-12, 2025. The KeyBanc Capital Markets Consumer Conference Virtual, scheduled for Friday, December 12, will feature a Fireside Chat at 12:10 p.m. PT. The session will be live-streamed and a replay can be accessed on the investor relations section of the Stitch Fix website.

data.title: Lyft's CFO to speak at Nasdaq Investor Conference in London on Dec. 10. Event at 11:30 a.m. GMT. Webcast available.
data.description: Lyft, Inc. (Nasdaq: LYFT) shared that Erin Brewer, their CFO, is set to engage in a fireside chat during the Nasdaq 53rd Investor Conference, in partnership with Morgan Stanley, in London, U.K. This event is scheduled for Wednesday, December 10, 2025 at 11:30 a.m. GMT. A live webcast of the discussion will be accessible on Lyft's investor relations website section at http://investor.Lyft.com. Lyft is a company offering rides for daily commutes or significant trips that modify experiences.

data.title: Fastenal partners with FFA (Future Farmers of America), supports youth education and development. Proud to strengthen ties, promote career success.
data.description: In Winona, Minnesota, Fastenal Company (Nasdaq: FAST) has unveiled a fresh corporate partnership with the National FFA Organization, reinforcing its enduring commitment to agricultural education and youth empowerment. The FFA, which stands for Future Farmers of America, is a non-profit organization focused on enhancing the lives of students by fostering their leadership skills, personal development, and career achievements through agricultural education. This collaboration marks an exciting opportunity to deepen their mutual support.

data.title: Former Fed official Tom Hoenig warns against a December rate cut despite 3% inflation, predicting a close 7-5 vote. Unemployment at 4.1%. Fed risks normalizing 3% inflation if it eases now.
data.description: Tom Hoenig, former Kansas City Fed president and ex-FOMC voting member, believes the Federal Reserve is on the brink of a mistake. Despite inflation standing at 3%, Hoenig predicts the Fed will likely reduce rates in December. He suggests that Chairman Jerome Powell may be strategizing to avoid being on the losing side of a 7-5 vote. Hoenig diverges from the consensus, asserting that easing would be unwise considering the economy's decent performance with unemployment at 4.1%. He questions the rationale of easing while inflation remains significantly above the target rate. Hoenig warns of the potential consequences, highlighting the risk of normalizing a 3% inflation rate if the Fed changes course at this juncture. The full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Parsons wins spot on $1B Sound Transit contract for transit expansion by 2025.
data.description: Parsons Corporation has successfully obtained a spot on Sound Transit's Multiple Award Task Order Contract for 2025, which has a maximum value of $1 billion.

data.title: Top Wealth Group Holding Limited expects significant profit growth in 2025 for its premium sturgeon caviar and fine winery products.
data.description: In Hong Kong on December 5, 2025, Top Wealth Group Holding Limited, listed on NASDAQ as TWG, a prominent provider of high-quality sturgeon caviar and fine winery goods, revealed a favorable profit forecast for the fiscal year closing on December 31, 2025.

data.title: AEP Texas Foundation donates $75,000 to Port Aransas Art Center for 2-year youth art education program.
data.description: In a recent announcement on December 5, 2025, the AEP Texas Foundation has allocated a significant $75,000 grant to support the Port Aransas Art Center. The grant is specifically designated to benefit the Creative Horizons initiative, catering to young artists aged 14-18. This two-year program aims to enhance arts education for teenagers through various avenues such as hands-on workshops, involvement in Art Center courses, mentorship from experienced teaching artists, chances to showcase their work, and structured volunteer opportunities. The program is strategically crafted to introduce students to the realms of arts administration and community involvement, providing them with valuable experiences and skill sets.

data.title: Emerita receives court resolution in Aznalcóllar trial, no criminal convictions on the accused.
data.description: In Toronto on December 5, 2025, Emerita Resources Corp. disclosed that the Third Section of the Provincial Court of Seville has decided not to levy any criminal convictions against the accused in the Aznalcóllar criminal trial. Emerita, listed on TSX-V as EMO, OTCQB as EMOTF, and FSE as LLJA, welcomed the Court's ruling.

data.title: Olympus issues a voluntary corrective action for its Single-Use Ligating Device ("PolyLoop") due to safety concerns.
data.description: Today, in Center Valley, Pennsylvania, Olympus Corporation disclosed a voluntary medical device corrective action on Dec. 5, 2025, concerning its Single-Use Ligating Device known as "PolyLoop" due to safety concerns. The PolyLoop device is typically used with Olympus equipment.
